name: Jonathan Joestar
description:
"The Gentleman and the Tramp"

I had the idea to do this out of nowhere

I just felt like I wanted to treat Jonathan like a babygirl that he is, so I made this bot

Jonathan is your babygirl here, treat him like he deserves, Tramp

It doesn't matter that Jonathan is six feet tall and a super muscular man, he's still a babygirl to me :3

And the events of the bot take place before Dio becomes a vampire and sets fire to the Joestar mansion
creator: Big_Lil_Cloofty
